name: ROCm Accelerator (AMD)
author: Schaka
description: Runs musicnn on the AMD GPU via ONNX Runtime's MIGraphX provider and swaps the lyrics ASR backend to faster-whisper (CTranslate2 ROCm). Requires the AudioMuse-AI ROCm worker image; inert on other images.

versions.changelog: Proof of concept: MIGraphX provider for musicnn + faster-whisper ASR backend.
